title: microtoena delavayi
intro: Microtoena delavayi is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the mint family. This plant is native to China and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Microtoena delavayi include reducing fever, relieving headaches, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are typically used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
